'''yazhumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enallage|enallage]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enallage|enallage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yazhumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæzhimith|yæzhimith]] || [[word:yæzhimij|yæzhimij]] || [[word:yæzhimish|yæzhimish]] || [[word:yæzhimi|yæzhimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazhuzhumuth|yazhuzhumuth]] || [[word:yazhuzhumuj|yazhuzhumuj]] || [[word:yazhuzhumush|yazhuzhumush]] || [[word:yazhuzhumu|yazhuzhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazhumuth|yazhumuth]] || [[word:yazhumuj|yazhumuj]] || [[word:yazhumush|yazhumush]] || [[word:yazhumu|yazhumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazhufmuth|yazhufmuth]] || [[word:yazhufmuj|yazhufmuj]] || [[word:yazhufmush|yazhufmush]] || [[word:yazhufmuf|yazhufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazhumuthu|yazhumuthu]] || [[word:yazhumuju|yazhumuju]] || [[word:yazhumushu|yazhumushu]] || [[word:yazhumuku|yazhumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazhumuth|yazhumuth]] || [[word:yazhumuj|yazhumuj]] || [[word:yazhumush|yazhumush]] || [[word:yazhumu|yazhumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazhumuthul|yazhumuthul]] || [[word:yazhumujul|yazhumujul]] || [[word:yazhumushul|yazhumushul]] || [[word:yazhumukul|yazhumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazhumuthuthu|yazhumuthuthu]] || [[word:yazhumujuju|yazhumujuju]] || [[word:yazhumushushu|yazhumushushu]] || [[word:yazhumuku|yazhumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazhumuthun|yazhumuthun]] || [[word:yazhumujun|yazhumujun]] || [[word:yazhumushun|yazhumushun]] || [[word:yazhumukun|yazhumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazhumuthuoro|yazhumuthuoro]] || [[word:yazhumujuoro|yazhumujuoro]] || [[word:yazhumushuoro|yazhumushuoro]] || [[word:yazhumukuoro|yazhumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
